jobs.title: Daily Funny Punjabi Shorts
jobs.description:
I’m starting a daily stream of light-hearted Punjabi comedy clips built specifically for Instagram Reels. Each piece should feel fresh, quick, and highly shareable while keeping the humor rooted in everyday Punjabi life—slapstick, satire, or any other style that lands well with our audience is welcome as long as it stays clean and relatable. The finished videos must arrive ready to post in vertical (9:16) format, with hard-coded Hindi subtitles so viewers can enjoy them even on mute.

To keep the cadence consistent, I need one short (roughly 30–60 seconds) edited reel delivered every 24 hours.
skills: Audio ProductionAudio ServicesComedy WritingContent CreationMotion GraphicsSocial Media MarketingVideo EditingVoice Talent

jobs.title: Ultra-Low-Latency Call Metadata API using Go lang
jobs.description: I am building a stateless Go micro-service that will sit between Orange’s push-based feed of live call events and several AI/agent components that must query this data almost instantly for real-time analytics and automated responses. The telecom platform pushes each call record to us in JSON; from the moment it arrives I need to park it in a shared in-memory Redis instance and make it queryable through a tiny HTTP API that will be deployed on Google Cloud Run. End-to-end lookup latency must stay well under the typical network round-trip so downstream systems can react inside the ongoing call.

jobs.title: Vibrant Landing Page & Speed Optimization
jobs.description:
I need two related improvements completed side-by-side.

First, build a brand-new landing page whose sole purpose is lead generation. The look should be colorful and vibrant, matching the energy of my brand while still feeling professional. A clean contact form and eye-catching call-to-action buttons belong above the fold and again toward the bottom to maximise conversions. Please make the layout fully responsive, wire it into my existing CRM/email platform, and leave space for A/B testing of headlines and hero images.
